positive_claims.statement: The configured evaluation harness reported that the model candidate met the benchmark threshold under the referenced evaluation configuration.

non_claims.statement: No claim is made that this model is ready for production deployment.
No claim is made that use of this model is legally sufficient for any workflow.
No claim is made that the model, deployment, or organization satisfies any regulatory requirement.
No claim is made about future model versions, retrains, distribution shift, or deployment configuration changes.

upstream_claims_received.summary: Dataset manifest was supplied for evaluation context.

upstream_claims_relied_on.reason: Evaluation result depended on the dataset manifest referenced by the configured evaluation harness.

upstream_claims_rejected.reason: Deployment approval label was not relied on because this CBC only preserves an evaluation result boundary.

transitivity_policy.statement: This benchmark-pass claim is transferable only as evidence about the referenced model, benchmark, dataset manifest, and evaluation configuration tuple.

inheritance_policy.statement: Any downstream use of this benchmark-pass claim must preserve the non-claims about deployment readiness, legal sufficiency, regulatory compliance, and future performance.

known_gaps.statement: The evaluation result does not include production deployment context.

human_or_institutional_decisions_remaini.statement: A competent institutional authority must separately decide whether this model may be deployed.
Legal and compliance review remain outside this CBC.
